name: ClawSqueezer
description: 🍋 Stale content eviction — squeeze images, tool results, and exec outputs from context

staleTurns.description: Turns before content becomes eligible for eviction

minTokensToSqueeze.description: Minimum token size to consider for eviction

keepPreviewChars.description: Characters of preview to keep from evicted content

imageAgeTurns.description: Turns before images are evicted (lower = more aggressive)
